parents.subject: LU-19131 utils: mlock lfs DIO buffer pages

commit.subject: LU-18357 tests: fix interop for multiple fileset syntax
commit.message:
LU-18357 tests: fix interop for multiple fileset syntax

Multiple filesets use a new syntax that is incompatible with the
previous single fileset representation. Depending on the client and
server versions, this can cause tests to fail as the can't validate a
fileset was set correctly.

This patch adds better version checks and transparently handles the
new and old syntax in "wait_update_facet_fileset()",
"wait_nm_sync_fileset()", and "do_facet_check_fileset()".

Fixes: 40cd140b85 ("LU-18357 ptlrpc: Support add and del alternate filesets")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec serverversion=EXA6
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec serverjob=lustre-b2_15 serverbuildno=107 serverdistro=el8.10
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec serverjob=lustre-b2_16 serverbuildno=6 serverdistro=el9.4
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9e5b60d21a4d2c7fa5a8cc21f70f544759c0ea03
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60673
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
